case_title: FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP. vs. WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 808 LEAVENWORTH ST, #502, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH DOES 1 - 30 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.17 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS IT IS HEREBY ORDER THAT THE SUMMONS BE SERVED BY POSTING AND SUMMON AND MAILING A COPY OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FHL COMPANY , A FOREIGN CORP. SERVED APR-25-1994, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WOODARD, ANTHONY KEITH
